items.briefing:
Australian authorities are warning that hackers are actively targeting websites running outdated or vulnerable content management systems (CMS) — such as WordPress or similar platforms — as part of a global campaign. If your organisation runs a website, ensure it's updated and patched promptly. Separately, Australian firms are being cautioned about rushing AI adoption without proper safeguards, as the speed of uptake is outpacing security awareness and risk management practices.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation has a website, check with your web provider this week to confirm all software and plugins are up to date.

featured.title: Australia warns of global campaign targeting vulnerable CMS platforms - BleepingComputer
featured.quote: Australia warns of global campaign targeting vulnerable CMS platforms used by many local businesses.
